content: Explore AdminPage.js, models.py, and err.js to understand current code
Update backend DepartmentCreate model with validators (code 1-8, pattern, uppercase)
Add unique indexes on departments.name and departments.code + handle 409 duplicates
Patch AdminPage.js Departments dialog: required asterisks, client validation, errString wiring, auto-uppercase code
Apply errString defense across other Admin dialogs (Stations, Locations, Asset Types, Users)
Clean up duplicate S&T department entry in DB
Screenshot verify + lint frontend + backend stderr check
